imageAlt: Push notification when GoCardless mandate is approved roadmap item preview image
title: Push notification when GoCardless mandate is approved
summaryBody: On approval currently GC sends email to company who requested mandate. Would this be useful on top of that or annoying duplication? GC usage not high enough to justify this work atm - wait to see impact of further GC releases on usage
detailBody: On approval currently GC sends email to company who requested mandate. Would this be useful on top of that or annoying duplication? GC usage not high enough to justify this work atm - wait to see impact of further GC releases on usage
